steps.note: +job/resolve <#>[=<comment>] archives the job with status 'resolved' (distinct from 'closed'). It fires the job:resolved hook and mails the submitter.

steps.cmd: +request Login Crash=The game crashes when connecting from a mobile client.
steps.label: player submits the job

steps.cmd: +job/resolve 1=Issue confirmed fixed. Mobile client crash resolved by engine update v2.4.1.
steps.label: resolve and archive with a closing note

steps.note: +archive lists all archived jobs sorted newest-first. +archive <#> shows the full archived record including all comments.

steps.expect: The game crashes when connecting from a mobile client.
Issue confirmed fixed. Mobile client crash resolved by engine update

steps.note: +job/reopen <#> moves the job back to active with status 'open' and clears closedByName. The job:reopened hook fires.
